dbQueries: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(publishedAt) as with_publishedAt, COUNT(source) as with_source, COUNT(trustLevel) as with_trustLevel FROM NewsEvent;
SELECT trustLevel, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM NewsEvent GROUP BY trustLevel ORDER BY cnt DESC;
SELECT source, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM NewsEvent GROUP BY source ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT MIN(publishedAt), MAX(publishedAt), MIN(ingestedAt), MAX(ingestedAt) FROM NewsEvent;

pitSafetyFieldsPresent.publishedAtNote: publishedAt is the actual event publication datetime from the source. For news events, this IS the source-present timestamp — it records when the event entered public availability. This is semantically equivalent to releaseDate for the news domain.
pitSafetyFieldsPresent.releaseDateSourceNote: No explicit releaseDateSource companion field. Source is captured in the source column (1018/1018 populated).
pitSafetyFieldsPresent.releaseDateConfidenceNote: No explicit releaseDateConfidence companion field. Unlike MonthlyRevenue (INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH policy), NewsEvent publishedAt is the actual recorded publication time from the originating RSS/web source — confidence is inherently RECORDED rather than INFERRED.

sourcePresentReadiness.pitGateFieldNote: publishedAt field records the actual publication timestamp from the originating news source. Coverage: 100% (1018/1018). This is the natural source-present PIT gate for news events — unlike MonthlyRevenue which required an INFERRED policy, NewsEvent publishedAt is RECORDED directly from the source.
sourcePresentReadiness.pitConfidenceNote: publishedAt is a recorded timestamp from the originating source, not inferred. This is a stronger source-present guarantee than MonthlyRevenue's INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH policy.
sourcePresentReadiness.eligibilityNote: 1018 rows, 100% publishedAt coverage. publishedAt serves as the PIT gate field. All rows are eligible for source-present dry-run.

companionFieldGap.gapDetail: NewsEvent lacks explicit releaseDateSource and releaseDateConfidence companion fields present in MonthlyRevenue. However: (1) source field fills the releaseDateSource role, (2) trustLevel field partially fills the confidence role, (3) publishedAt is RECORDED not INFERRED so confidence is inherently higher than MonthlyRevenue's LOW/INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH.
companionFieldGap.recommendation: For full MonthlyRevenue-pattern parity, a future phase could add releaseDateSource and releaseDateConfidence fields to NewsEvent. This is NOT required to block the current dry-run gate.

auditConclusion: NewsEvent table exists with 1018 rows. publishedAt coverage: 100% (1018/1018). source coverage: 100% (1018/1018). trustLevel coverage: 100% (1018/1018). publishedAt serves as the PIT gate field — it is a RECORDED timestamp from the originating news source, providing stronger source-present confidence than MonthlyRevenue's inferred policy. All 1018 rows are eligible for source-present dry-run. entersAlphaScore=false preserved.
disclaimer: Structural audit contract only. Does not constitute investment advice. No profit, return, or investment performance claims are made. NewsEvent entersAlphaScore = false. ALWAYS. Results must not be used as buy/sell/hold signals or investment recommendations.
